name: BankrMine
description: BankrMine ($MINE) is a fair-launch mint-on-claim ERC-20 on Base. Total supply starts at 0 and is minted lazily as miners redeem off-chain proof-of-work IOUs through a backend-signed claim(). Hard cap 100,000,000 MINE. 90% (90M) distributed via browser-based CPU keccak256 mining, 5% LP seed, 5% deployer reserve. Era 1 reward 500 MINE/mint, halving every 100,000 mints. Anti-replay nonces tracked on-chain.
